        /// An <see cref="T:System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1" /> of <see cref="T:global::TestModels.ExternalProduct"/> objects.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<global::TestModels.ExternalProduct> Query<TEntity>(
            this global::FluentCommand.IDataQuery dataQuery)
            where TEntity : global::TestModels.ExternalProduct

            return dataQuery.Query<global::TestModels.ExternalProduct>(
                factory: ExternalProductDataReaderExtensions.ExternalProductFactory,

        }

        /// <summary>
        /// A factory for creating <see cref="T:global::TestModels.ExternalProduct"/> objects from the current row in the specified <paramref name="dataRecord"/>.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataRecord">The open <see cref="T:System.Data.IDataReader"/> to get the object from.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// A instance of <see cref="global::TestModels.ExternalProduct"/>  having property names set that match the field names in the <paramref name="dataRecord"/>.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::TestModels.ExternalProduct ExternalProductFactory(this global::System.Data.IDataReader dataRecord)
        {
            if (dataRecord == null)
                throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(dataRecord));

            var __jsonSerializerOptions = dataRecord is global::FluentCommand.IDataReaderContext __context
                ? __context.JsonSerializerOptions
                : null;

            return ExternalProductFactory(dataRecord, __jsonSerializerOptions);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// A factory for creating <see cref="T:global::TestModels.ExternalProduct"/> objects from the current row in the specified <paramref name="dataRecord"/>.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dataRecord">The open <see cref="T:System.Data.IDataReader"/> to get the object from.</param>
        /// <param name="jsonSerializerOptions">The JSON serializer options to use for JSON columns.</param>
        /// <returns>
        /// A instance of <see cref="global::TestModels.ExternalProduct"/>  having property names set that match the field names in the <paramref name="dataRecord"/>.
        /// </returns>
        public static global::TestModels.ExternalProduct ExternalProductFactory(
            this global::System.Data.IDataReader dataRecord,
            global::System.Text.Json.JsonSerializerOptions? jsonSerializerOptions)
        {
            if (dataRecord == null)
                throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(dataRecord));

            int v_id = default!;
            string v_name = default!;
            global::TestModels.ProductMetadata v_metadata = default!;

            for (var __index = 0; __index < dataRecord.FieldCount; __index++)
            {
                if (dataRecord.IsDBNull(__index))
                     continue;

                var __name = dataRecord.GetName(__index);
                switch (__name)
                {
                    case "Id":
                        v_id = dataRecord.GetInt32(__index);
                        break;
                    case "display_name":
                        v_name = dataRecord.GetString(__index);
                        break;
                    case "Metadata":
                        v_metadata = dataRecord.GetRequiredFromJson<global::TestModels.ProductMetadata>(__index, jsonSerializerOptions);
                        break;
                }
            }

            return new global::TestModels.ExternalProduct
            {
                Id =  v_id,
                Name =  v_name,
                Metadata =  v_metadata
            };
        }
